name: task-worker
description: Provider-neutral work-graph planning, parallel ready-set execution, integration gates, and local verification lifecycle.

interface.shortDescription: Decompose, run, and verify provider-neutral work graphs.
interface.longDescription: Defines immutable work graphs, plans every ready leaf and integration candidate from local or provider snapshots, isolates local runs in stable worktrees, and records structured verification evidence without requiring GitHub, Studio, wiki, or a review provider.
defaultPrompt: Use $define to create or revise an immutable provider-neutral work graph.
Use $orchestrate to dispatch every ready leaf in parallel-safe worktrees.
Use $verify to attach evidence before $done closes a local run.
